title: Fraud Risk Agent Workbench
subtitle: Evidence-bound AI analyst layer over the IEEE-CIS fraud model pipeline.

agent_responses.question: What is the OOT model performance?
agent_responses.answer:
LightGBM is the champion OOT model. Test PR-AUC=0.5703, ROC-AUC=0.8920, KS=0.6304.
Evidence: artifacts/metrics/holdout_metrics.json; artifacts/metrics/topk_table.csv

agent_responses.question: How should we set review and decline thresholds?
agent_responses.answer:
Three-way policy produces approve/manual_review/decline actions. Cost-min threshold reviews 17.04% with precision 15.85%, recall 77.62%, and expected cost 261376.56.
Evidence: artifacts/policy/policy_tradeoff_table.csv; artifacts/policy/decision_policy_summary.csv; artifacts/policy/threshold.json

agent_responses.question: Explain transaction 3402093 with reason codes.
agent_responses.answer:
Transaction 3402093 has score 0.999998. Top positive reason codes are V258 (2.51), C1 (2.32), V45 (1.83).
Evidence: artifacts/outputs/reason_codes_sample.csv

agent_responses.question: Is there any PSI or score drift alert?
agent_responses.answer:
Monitoring found 0 PSI feature alerts. Latest score window mean is 0.0311 with score PSI 0.0009.
Evidence: artifacts/monitoring/psi_report.csv; artifacts/monitoring/score_drift.csv
